hero.title: Engagements I run
hero.subtitle: Four ways we can work together — pick the closest match and we'll shape the details on a call.

web.title: Web application
web.description: I design, build and launch fullstack web apps in React/TypeScript with a Postgres or Supabase backend. Best for founders going from zero to first paying customers, or teams replacing a legacy product.
deliverables: Production app on a custom domain

mobile.title: Mobile app
mobile.description: Cross-platform apps that share design tokens and business logic with your web product. Native modules where they matter (payments, auth, offline). I publish to the stores and set up over-the-air updates.
deliverables: Expo project ready for OTA updates

mvp.title: MVP sprint
mvp.tagline: Two to six weeks, idea to live demo.
mvp.description: Founder-friendly fixed-scope sprint. We agree on the smallest thing that proves the idea, and I build exactly that — designed to be shown to users or investors at the end.
deliverables: Deployed staging URL the whole time
Source code, deploy keys and a 60-minute walkthrough

consulting.title: Consulting & audits
consulting.tagline: Short engagements that move the needle.
consulting.description: Code review, architecture sessions, performance audits or pairing weeks. Useful when you have a team but want a second pair of eyes on a hard choice.
deliverables: Live walkthrough call with your team

items.a: Fixed-price for sprints and consulting; for larger builds I quote a fixed monthly retainer once the scope is clear. No hourly rate after the brief is signed off.

items.q: Do you work with non-Vietnamese clients?
items.a: Yes — about half my work is remote with founders in Europe and North America. I write and speak English fluently and run async-friendly weekly check-ins.

items.q: Can you work with my existing team?
items.a: Often, yes. I've slotted into product teams as a senior contractor and as a temporary tech lead. Code review and architecture work translates especially well.
I don't do pure design (no Figma → pixel-perfect handoff), and I avoid heavily regulated domains (healthcare, banking) where my experience is thin.
Usually within 2 — 4 weeks of the kickoff call. Urgent rescues sometimes faster — ask.

cta.title: Not sure which fits?
cta.subtitle: Tell me about the problem in a sentence and I'll point at the right engagement.
